task_description: The 'search-index' service experienced gradually increasing memory usage starting 7h before the outage at 07:13 UTC. A recent deployment introduced a memory leak in the connection pool component.

commits.author: heidi@company.com
commits.message: perf: simplify connection pool retry logic
commits.diff:
--- a/search-index-service/connection_pool.go
+++ b/search-index-service/connection_pool.go
-// Old: stable configuration
-config.MaxSize = 100
-config.Timeout = 30 * time.Second
+// New: reduced limits for 'optimization'
+config.MaxSize = 8
+config.Timeout = 2 * time.Second
+// WARNING: This may cause issues under high load
